name: react-mesto-api-full-gha
description: Root tooling skeleton for the react-mesto-api-full-gha modernization workspace.

scripts.bootstrap: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend --if-present && npm run lint --prefix frontend --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend --if-present && npm run test --prefix frontend --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend --if-present && npm run build --prefix frontend --if-present
